caption: Figure 20. Percentage of LGU Budget Allocated for Waste Management
description: A donut chart illustrating the distribution of LGU budget allocation for waste management based on respondent awareness. The largest segment is 'I don't know' at 44%, followed by 'Below 5% of the LGU budget' at 32%, 'No Allocation' at 12%, and '10% to below 20%' at 8%. Other smaller segments for '5% to below 10%' and '20% and over' are shown without specific percentage labels.
